meta.description: Room templates for procedural dungeon generation. Each Age has its own deck of room types.

air.name: Wind Gallery
air.description: A long tunnel carved by endless wind. Rings of pale stone recede into darkness. Streaks of silver light race along the walls.
air.atmosphere: The air hums. Sometimes it sounds like a voice just beyond hearing.

air.name: Codex Chamber
air.description: A square room dominated by a massive stone wall carved with a 3×3 grid. Each cell holds a faded glyph.
air.atmosphere: The grid pulses faintly when you look away.

air.name: Scribe Desk
air.description: An angled stone desk covered in ritual objects — a stylus, a bowl of pale pigment, a scrap of vellum.
air.atmosphere: The vellum is warm, as if recently handled.

air.name: Observatory
air.description: A circular room open to a false sky. Constellations of glyph-light drift across the dome. A stone plinth stands at center.
air.atmosphere: The stars here are not the stars you know.

air.name: Inscription Hall
air.description: A narrow corridor lined with floor-to-ceiling inscriptions. The text covers every surface — even the floor.
air.atmosphere: The inscriptions shift when you're not looking directly at them.

air.name: Sanctum of Breath
air.description: A vast domed chamber. At its center, a column of swirling silver light rises from floor to ceiling. The exit portal.
air.atmosphere: The breath is visible here. It hangs in the air like incense smoke.
